name: LujoEmotes
tagline: Premium Minecraft emote system for dynamic server engagement
description: A Premium Minecraft plugin that transforms player interactions by offering custom emotes for deaths and assassinations.

architectureNarrative.problemStatement: Minecraft servers needed customizable player animations with multi-database support and deep API integration
architectureNarrative.solution: Built modular plugin with abstracted database layer, PlaceholderAPI ecosystem integration, and animation framework support
keyDecisions: PlaceholderAPI integration for maximum server compatibility
architectureNarrative.architectureDiagram:
graph TB
Spigot[Spigot Server]-->Plugin[LujoEmotes Plugin]
Plugin-->Config[YAML Config]
Plugin-->DB[(MySQL/SQLite/MariaDB)]
Plugin-->API[PlaceholderAPI]
Plugin-->Models[ModelEngine]
Plugin-->Myths[MythicMobs]

primary.name: Java 17
primary.reason: Modern JVM features and performance optimizations

alternatives.name: MongoDB
alternatives.whyNot: SQL databases better suited for config data

features.name: Emotes Animation
features.description: Player death and murder emotes

features.name: PlaceholderAPI Integration
features.description: Allows to obtain with placeholder api all the information of the emotes of players.

features.name: Database
features.description: Support SQLite, MySQL ,MariaDB

features.name: Easy Files config
features.description: The configuration files are easy to use.

features.name: Fully customizable
features.description: You can create your own animations.

features.name: All language support
features.description: Translate it to the language of your choice.

features.name: MythicMobs
features.description: You can summon things that are not animations, if you want to use it for another purpose when you die, for example a minion.

features.name: ModelEngine
features.description: You can invoke entities/animations with custom 3d models with ModelEngine.

name: LujoKarts
tagline: Advanced Minecraft kart racing plugin with dynamic mechanics
description: Advanced racing plugin for Minecraft servers with custom kart mechanics and physics simulation.

architectureNarrative.problemStatement: Minecraft lacked sophisticated racing mechanics with customizable karts and realistic physics
architectureNarrative.solution: Designed plugin with event-driven architecture, custom entity spawning, and physics calculation engine
keyDecisions: Event-driven architecture for real-time player interactions
Custom entity spawning for kart visualization
Separate physics calculation system for performance
architectureNarrative.architectureDiagram:
graph TB
Spigot[Spigot Server]-->Plugin[LujoKarts Engine]
Plugin-->Physics[Physics Engine]
Plugin-->Entities[Entity Manager]
Plugin-->Config[Race Config]
Entities-->Models[ModelEngine]

alternatives.name: Kotlin
alternatives.whyNot: Java provides better performance for physics

name: BasePlugin
tagline: Comprehensive framework for Spigot and BungeeCord plugin development
description: BasePlugin is a comprehensive Minecraft development solution, providing tools and APIs for custom plugin creation. This project streamlines plugin development, enabling creators to focus on innovation.

architectureNarrative.problemStatement: Minecraft plugin developers needed unified framework supporting both Spigot and BungeeCord with modular generation
architectureNarrative.solution: Created multi-module architecture with separation of concerns, enabling selective JAR generation
keyDecisions: Dual-platform support in single codebase via abstraction layers
Modular JAR generation reducing deployment size
Built-in utilities for common plugin patterns
architectureNarrative.architectureDiagram:
graph TB
Framework[BasePlugin Framework]
Framework-->Spigot[Spigot Module]
Framework-->Bungee[BungeeCord Module]
Framework-->Common[Common Module]
Common-->Utils[Utilities]
Common-->APIs[Core APIs]

alternatives.name: Maven
alternatives.whyNot: Gradle faster and more flexible for multi-module

features.name: All in one
features.description: Allows development for both Spigot and BungeeCord within the same project

features.name: Modular
features.description: Enables generation of JAR files with only the essentials

name: BlockCounter
tagline: Lightweight PlaceholderAPI extension for real-time block statistics
description: It is a placeholderExtension which gives us the information of a block with its placeholder.

architectureNarrative.problemStatement: Minecraft servers needed efficient way to query block information via placeholders without database overhead
architectureNarrative.solution: Lightweight extension using PlaceholderAPI for direct block data queries
keyDecisions: PlaceholderAPI integration for seamless server compatibility
Simple API for block data retrieval
architectureNarrative.architectureDiagram:
graph TB
Server[Minecraft Server]
Server-->PlaceholderAPI[PlaceholderAPI]
PlaceholderAPI-->BlockCounter[BlockCounter Extension]
BlockCounter-->BlockQuery[Block Query Engine]

features.name: Simple
features.description: Simple and minimalist use and installation

name: Murcis Luis Network Web
tagline: High-performance gaming community platform with forum and blog system
description: Our Minecraft server website is a dynamic and vibrant platform where users can engage with the community through various features. We offer a comprehensive forum system where players can discuss strategies, share experiences, and solve queries. The blogs allow users to express their creativity, post Minecraft-related news, and keep the community updated on server events. Additionally, the site includes a comment section and a like system, facilitating interaction among members and promoting a collaborative and friendly atmosphere. Our website is designed to be the central meeting point for all server fans, providing a rich online experience that complements in-game adventures.

architectureNarrative.problemStatement: Gaming communities needed low-latency platform with real-time features and rich content capabilities
architectureNarrative.solution: Built on Qwik for resumability and edge deployment, Firebase for scalable real-time data
keyDecisions: Qwik for instant-on performance and minimal JavaScript
Tailwind CSS for rapid UI iteration
architectureNarrative.architectureDiagram:
graph TB
Client[Qwik Client]
Edge[Vercel Edge Functions]
Firebase[Firebase Realtime DB]
NodeJS[Node.js Backend]
Client-->Edge
Edge-->Firebase
Edge-->NodeJS

features.name: Responsive
features.description: The website is fully responsive, allowing users to access content from any device, whether it's a computer, tablet, or smartphone, ensuring an optimal user experience across all platforms.

features.name: Blogs System
features.description: Designed for simple and minimalist use and installation, the blog system enables users to easily create and share content, keeping the community informed and engaged.

features.name: Forum System
features.description: Our forum system offers a straightforward and minimalist platform for players to discuss topics, exchange ideas, and resolve queries, fostering interaction and mutual support within the community.

features.name: Comments System
features.description: With easy and minimalist configuration and installation, the comments system allows users to interact with content efficiently by sharing opinions and feedback.

features.name: Updates from Server
features.description: We provide constant and easy-to-manage updates about the server, keeping the community informed about the latest changes, improvements, and events.

features.name: Design Friendly
features.description: The website features a simple and minimalist design that facilitates use and installation, ensuring users can navigate and find the information they need without complications.

name: Manga Tracker
tagline: Browser extension for tracking manga/manwha reading progress across platforms
description: Extension to chromium navigators to save the progress of the manga/manwhas.

architectureNarrative.problemStatement: Manga readers needed unified way to track progress across multiple reading platforms
architectureNarrative.solution: Built browser extension with local storage and cross-platform site detection
keyDecisions: Support for multiple manga platforms via content scripts
Grid/list view toggles for UI flexibility
architectureNarrative.architectureDiagram:
graph TB
Extension[Manga Tracker Extension]
Extension-->Storage[Local Storage]
Extension-->ContentScript[Content Scripts]
ContentScript-->Site1[Manga Site 1]
ContentScript-->Site2[Manga Site 2]
ContentScript-->Site3[Manga Site 3]

features.name: Support multiple pages
features.description: https://leerolymp.com/ , https://manhwaweb.com/ , https://www.leercapitulo.co/ , https://taurusmanga.com/

features.name: Multiple Views
features.description: Change the view in grid or list

features.name: Save scroll
features.description: Restore the scroll position to read the manga

features.name: Auto next Page
features.description: Restore the scroll position to read the manga
